scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.situation: 대만 타이페이 공항에 도착했다. 친절한 분위기와 깔끔한 공항.
scenes.npcDialog: Huānyíng! Welcome to Taiwan! Transfer passengers please follow signs. You have 3 hours - try our famous boba tea!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환잉! 대만에 오신 것을 환영합니다! 환승 승객은 표지판을 따라가세요. 3시간 있어요 - 유명한 버블티 드세요!

choices.text: Xièxiè! Boba tea is on my list! Where's the best place to get it?
Thank you! What else should I try with 3 hours?
I'll just wait at the gate.
choices.feedback: 대만 문화를 경험할 기회를 놓치게 됩니다.

scenes.situation: 대만 발명품인 버블티를 주문한다. 다양한 맛과 토핑이 있다.
scenes.npcDialog: Original boba tea from Taiwan! Milk tea with tapioca pearls - classic! Or try taro, brown sugar, mango. Sugar level? Ice level?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 대만 오리지널 버블티예요! 밀크티에 타피오카 펄 - 클래식! 아니면 타로, 흑설탕, 망고 드셔보세요. 당도는요? 얼음은요?

choices.text: I'll try the classic milk tea with 50% sugar and less ice. How chewy are the pearls?
What's the most popular choice? I want the authentic Taiwanese experience!

choices.feedback: 버블티는 개인 취향에 맞게 주문하는 것이 좋습니다.

choices.text: These drinks have too much sugar.

scenes.situation: 대만 유명 간식인 파인애플 케이크를 발견했다.
scenes.npcDialog: Pineapple cake! Taiwan's most famous souvenir. This brand won gold medal. Perfect gift - very popular with tourists!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 파인애플 케이크! 대만에서 가장 유명한 기념품이에요. 이 브랜드는 금메달 탔어요. 완벽한 선물 - 관광객들한테 아주 인기있어요!

choices.text: Can I try a sample? I'd love to bring some back as gifts!
What makes Taiwanese pineapple cake special compared to others?
All pineapple cakes taste the same.
choices.feedback: 대만 파인애플 케이크는 특별한 레시피가 있습니다.

scenes.situation: 다음 비행기 탑승 시간이다. 대만의 친절함이 인상적이었다.
scenes.npcDialog: Now boarding. Thank you for stopping in Taiwan! Zàijiàn - goodbye! Come back for night markets and more boba!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 탑승을 시작합니다. 대만에 들러주셔서 감사합니다! 짜이지엔 - 안녕히 가세요! 야시장과 버블티 더 먹으러 다시 오세요!

choices.text: The boba tea was amazing! I'll definitely come back to explore the night markets!
choices.feedback: 대만에 대한 관심과 재방문 의사를 표현합니다.

choices.text: Xièxiè! Everyone here was so friendly! Taiwan is on my bucket list now!

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Burj Khalifa - 828 meters tall! At the Top observation on 124th floor, or At the Top SKY on 148th. Sunset is magical. Book ahead!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 부르즈 칼리파에 오신 걸 환영해요 - 828미터! 앳더탑 전망대는 124층, 앳더탑 스카이는 148층. 일몰이 마법 같아요. 미리 예약하세요!

choices.text: 828 meters! I'll go to the 148th floor for best views.

scenes.npcDialog: Jumeirah Mosque welcomes visitors! We offer cultural tours explaining Islam. Please dress modestly - we provide abayas. Photography is allowed!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 점퍼 모스크는 방문객을 환영해요! 이슬람을 설명하는 문화 투어가 있어요. 단정하게 입으세요 - 아바야 제공해요. 사진 촬영 가능해요!

choices.text: I'd love to learn about the culture! What will the tour cover?
The architecture is beautiful! When is the next tour?
I don't want to cover up.

scenes.npcDialog: Burj Al Arab is the world's most luxurious hotel! Sail-shaped, on its own island. Restaurant reservations include access. High tea is popular!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 버즈 알 아랍은 세계에서 가장 럭셔리한 호텔이에요! 돛 모양, 자체 섬에 있어요. 레스토랑 예약하면 입장돼요. 하이티가 인기예요!

choices.text: High tea at the world's most luxurious hotel! Perfect!
The sail shape is iconic! Best photo spot?
Why is it on an island?

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you?

choices.text: I'm looking for work. Are you hiring?
Do you have any job openings?
I don't really want to work.

scenes.npcDialog: The bond is 4 weeks' rent. Any questions?

choices.text: When do I get it back?
Is it refundable if I leave early?

scenes.npcDialog: So you're leaving us. When's your last day?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 그럼 그만두시는 거군요. 마지막 날이 언제예요?

choices.text: In two weeks. I'll finish all my duties.
I'm giving 2 weeks' notice as required.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! You have a private room with shared bathroom. Breakfast is included!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 공용 화장실이 있는 개인실이에요. 조식 포함이에요!

choices.text: Great! What time is breakfast served?
Perfect, can I see the room first?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a half-day group tour for 35 euros. Interested?

choices.text: How big is the group usually?
That's too expensive for a group.
I want a private tour for that price.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Mall is the world's largest! Over 1,200 shops. We have an aquarium, ice rink, and dinosaur skeleton! The fountain show outside is free!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 몰은 세계 최대예요! 1,200개 넘는 상점. 수족관, 아이스링크, 공룡 골격도 있어요! 바깥 분수쇼는 무료예요!

choices.text: An aquarium in a mall! That's incredible.

scenes.npcDialog: Dining at 555 meters! Our restaurant rotates 360 degrees. Seven-course tasting menu. The sunset views are spectacular. Smart dress required.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 555미터에서 식사해요! 레스토랑이 360도 회전해요. 7코스 테이스팅 메뉴. 일몰 전망이 장관이에요. 스마트 복장 필수예요.

choices.text: Rotating restaurant! How long for a full rotation?
Dining at 555 meters - what an experience!

scenes.npcDialog: Ski Dubai - real snow in the desert! 22,500 square meters of slopes. We provide all equipment and clothing. Penguins live here too!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스키 두바이 - 사막에 진짜 눈이에요! 22,500평방미터 슬로프. 장비와 옷 다 제공해요. 펭귄도 살아요!

choices.text: Real snow in the desert! Only in Dubai!

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here about the job posting?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to submit my resume.
I brought my CV. Who should I give it to?

scenes.npcDialog: Bills are not included in the rent.

choices.text: What bills do I need to pay separately?

scenes.npcDialog: Need help shipping your belongings home?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 짐 본국으로 배송하는 거 도움 필요하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much for 2 boxes to Korea?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Help yourself to the breakfast buffet.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좋은 아침이에요! 조식 뷔페 마음껏 드세요.

choices.text: Thank you! Is there fresh juice?
Great, what time does breakfast end?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you eligible for any discounts?

choices.text: Yes, I'm a student. Here's my ID.
I should get in for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Desert safari includes dune bashing in 4x4! Then BBQ dinner, camel rides, henna, and belly dancing at the camp. Sunset in the desert is unforgettable!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 사막 사파리에 4x4 듄 베싱 포함! 캠프에서 바베큐 저녁, 낙타 타기, 헤나, 벨리댄싱. 사막의 일몰은 잊지 못해요!

choices.text: Dune bashing sounds thrilling! Is it scary?
Sunset in the desert! I'll bring my camera.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Miracle Garden has 50 million flowers! The Emirates A380 plane made of flowers is famous. Only open November to May - it's too hot otherwise!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 미라클 가든에 5천만 송이 꽃이 있어요! 꽃으로 만든 에미레이츠 A380 비행기가 유명해요. 11월~5월만 열어요 - 그 외엔 너무 더워요!

choices.text: 50 million flowers! The colors must be incredible.
A plane made of flowers? I need to see that!

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Metro is driverless! Very clean and modern. Gold class has leather seats. Women and children have dedicated carriages. NOL card for all transport!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 메트로는 무인이에요! 아주 깨끗하고 현대적. 골드 클래스는 가죽 시트. 여성과 어린이 전용 칸 있어요. NOL 카드로 모든 교통!

choices.text: Where do I get a NOL card?

scenes.npcDialog: Thanks for coming in. Tell me about yourself.

choices.text: I'm from Korea and I'm on a working holiday visa.
I have experience in customer service.
I don't like talking about myself.
What do you want to know?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to set up home internet?

choices.text: How fast is your standard plan?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need before you go?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가기 전에 더 필요한 거 있으세요?

choices.text: Could you write me a reference letter?
May I use you as a reference for future jobs?
You have to write me a good review.

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes one checked bag. Would you like to check any luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에 위탁 수하물 1개가 포함되어 있어요. 수하물 부치시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes, I have one bag to check.
Can I check three bags for free?

scenes.npcDialog: Airport shuttle to the city center? It's 15 euros per person.

choices.text: Sure, when is the next one leaving?
How long does it take to the center?
That's too expensive for a shared ride.

scenes.npcDialog: Palm Jumeirah is the world's largest man-made island! Take the monorail for views. Atlantis hotel has an amazing aquaventure waterpark!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 팜 주메이라는 세계 최대 인공섬이에요! 모노레일 타면 경치 좋아요. 아틀란티스 호텔에 아쿠아벤처 워터파크가 끝내줘요!

choices.text: Man-made island! Dubai's engineering is amazing.
The waterpark looks fun! Is it included?

scenes.npcDialog: Spice Souk smells amazing! Saffron, frankincense, dried fruits. We have authentic Arabic incense - oud. Makes your home smell like Dubai!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스파이스 수크 냄새가 끝내줘요! 사프란, 유향, 건과일. 정통 아랍 향 - 우드가 있어요. 집에서 두바이 향기가 나요!

choices.text: The aromas are incredible! What's oud?
I'd love to buy some saffron! Is it real?
Spice markets are too strong smelling.
I can buy spices at home.

scenes.npcDialog: Mall of the Emirates has Ski Dubai! 630 stores, and we have all the luxury brands. The VOX cinema is incredible - gold class with bed seats!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 몰 오브 더 에미레이츠에 스키 두바이가 있어요! 630개 상점, 모든 럭셔리 브랜드. VOX 영화관이 끝내줘요 - 침대 시트 골드 클래스!

choices.text: Cinema with bed seats! That sounds amazing!

scenes.npcDialog: What hours are you available to work?

choices.text: I'm flexible. I can work weekends too.
I prefer mornings, but I can adjust.
I only work 2 hours a day.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something specific?

choices.text: I need a cheap bed and desk.

scenes.npcDialog: We'll miss you! When are you leaving?

choices.text: Next week. Thank you for everything!
I'll really miss you all. Let's keep in touch!

scenes.npcDialog: This is a local favorite. Would you like to try our special?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 현지인들이 좋아하는 곳이에요. 저희 스페셜 드셔보실래요?

choices.text: Yes, I'd love to try the local specialty!

scenes.npcDialog: This is handmade by local artisans. 25 euros.

choices.text: It's beautiful! Can I see more designs?
Does it come with any certificate of authenticity?
I can buy this cheaper online.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Try our mezze platter - hummus, falafel, tabbouleh. Then shawarma or grilled lamb. Arabic coffee and dates to finish. Ahlan wa sahlan!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영해요! 메제 플래터 드셔보세요 - 후무스, 팔라펠, 타불레. 그다음 샤와르마나 그릴드 램. 아랍 커피와 대추야자로 마무리. 아흘란 와 사흘란!

choices.text: I love mezze! What makes your hummus special?
Arabic coffee - is it different from regular coffee?
Middle Eastern food is too oily.

scenes.npcDialog: Al Fahidi is old Dubai! Wind towers, art galleries, museums. The Creek was the trading heart. Take an abra boat - only 1 dirham! Very traditional!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 알 파히디는 올드 두바이예요! 윈드 타워, 갤러리, 박물관. 크릭이 무역 중심지였어요. 아브라 보트 타세요 - 1디르함뿐! 아주 전통적이에요!

choices.text: 1 dirham boat ride! That's amazing value.
Wind towers are so clever - natural air conditioning!

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Fountain shoots water 150 meters high! Shows every 30 minutes from 6pm. Each show has different music - Arabic, pop, classical. Free to watch!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 분수는 물을 150미터까지 쏴요! 오후 6시부터 30분마다 쇼. 매번 다른 음악 - 아랍, 팝, 클래식. 무료예요!

choices.text: 150 meters! And free? I'll watch multiple shows!
Which spot has the best view?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any questions about the position?
Are you interested in this item?

choices.text: Yes, can I see it in person first?

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get started for you?

choices.text: A latte and a slice of apple pie, please.
What pastries do you have today?
Why is coffee so expensive here?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the ATM?

choices.text: Can I use my foreign card here?
Is there a fee for international cards?

scenes.npcDialog: Gold Souk has tons of gold! Prices by weight, not design. Bargaining is expected. We also have diamonds and pearls. What are you looking for?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 골드 수크에 금이 엄청나요! 가격은 무게로, 디자인 아니에요. 흥정 당연히 해요. 다이아몬드와 진주도 있어요. 뭐 찾으세요?

choices.text: The gold is stunning! How does bargaining work here?
Can I compare prices between shops?

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Frame is 150 meters tall! One side shows old Dubai, other side new Dubai. The glass floor at the top is thrilling. Perfect for photos!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 프레임은 150미터예요! 한쪽은 올드 두바이, 다른 쪽은 뉴 두바이. 꼭대기 유리 바닥이 스릴 있어요. 사진 찍기 딱이에요!

choices.text: Old and new Dubai in one view! Brilliant concept.
Glass floor! Is it really safe?

scenes.npcDialog: Your last night! Try our signature dish - camel burger! Or traditional machboos rice. Finish with luqaimat - sweet dumplings. Ma'a salama!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 밤이네요! 시그니처 - 카멜 버거 드셔보세요! 아니면 전통 마치부스 라이스. 루가이맛 - 달콤한 도넛으로 마무리. 마아 살라마!

choices.text: Camel burger! I have to try that!
Ma'a salama! This trip has been incredible.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here to register for tax?

choices.text: Yes, I just started working. What do I need?
How do I get a tax file number?
I don't want to pay taxes.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you registering as a new patient?

choices.text: Yes, I just moved here. What documents do I need?
Do you accept my working holiday insurance?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something specific?

choices.text: Where can I find local snacks?
Do you have any lunch deals?

scenes.npcDialog: The city pass includes unlimited transport and museum entries. 60 euros for 3 days.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 시티패스에 무제한 교통과 박물관 입장이 포함되어 있어요. 3일에 60유로입니다.

choices.text: That sounds like a good deal. I'll take one.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Marina is stunning! Dinner cruise, speedboat tour, or luxury yacht. The skyscrapers light up at night. Best views from the water!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 마리나는 멋져요! 디너 크루즈, 스피드보트 투어, 럭셔리 요트. 밤에 고층빌딩에 불이 켜져요. 물에서 전망이 최고예요!

choices.text: Dinner cruise sounds romantic! What's included?
The skyline at night must be incredible!

scenes.npcDialog: Arabic coffee is our hospitality tradition! Light roast with cardamom, served in small cups. Always drink with right hand. Dates balance the bitterness!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 아랍 커피는 우리 환대 전통이에요! 카다몬 넣은 약배전, 작은 컵에 나와요. 항상 오른손으로 마셔요. 대추야자가 쓴맛을 중화해요!

choices.text: Cardamom coffee sounds unique! I'll try it.
Right hand - I'll remember that cultural tip!

scenes.npcDialog: What type of account would you like to open?

choices.text: A basic checking account for my salary.
I need an account to receive my wages.
Just put cash in my hand.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'd like to apply for a visa extension.
What are the requirements for extending my visa?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you with tickets?

choices.text: I'd like a day pass, please.
How much is an unlimited daily ticket?
Tickets are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to rent a bike? It's 10 euros for the day.

choices.text: Yes, please! Is a helmet included?
Do you have a city bike map?
I don't know how to ride.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a long-term rental?

choices.text: Yes, I'll be here for about a year.
I want a mansion for cheap.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you filing for a tax return?

choices.text: Yes, I'm leaving the country soon.
How do I claim my tax back?
Give me all my money back.

scenes.npcDialog: Need help with the tram system?

choices.text: Which line goes to the museum district?
Where do I validate my ticket?

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
